title: Wedding Welcome Sign Stand, Adjustable Wedding Sign Holder Easel Stand for Display(White)
features: Adjustable Height Design: Easily switch between two height settings—4.2ft or 5.7ft—to suit different sign sizes and venue layouts. Whether for intimate indoor weddings or larger outdoor celebrations, this welcome sign stand adjusts to your needs in seconds.

Sturdy Metal Frame: Crafted from durable metal with a sleek black/gold finish, this sign stand provides reliable stability for your wedding signage. It holds up well both indoors and outdoors, resisting tipping and wobbling even in breezy conditions.

Includes 4pcs Leather Hanging Straps: Comes with four stylish leather straps that securely hang your welcome sign while adding a touch of elegance. Adjustable strap length accommodates various sign sizes and materials such as acrylic, wood, or foam board.

Versatile for Multiple Occasions: Ideal not only for wedding welcome signs, but also engagement parties, bridal showers, baby showers, and corporate events. A reusable display stand you’ll turn to again and again.
Reusable & Easy to Transport: Breaks down into compact parts for easy storage and transport. An economical and reusable solution, perfect for weddings and various occasions.
description: Product Features: Wedding Welcome Sign Stand Adjustable Wedding Sign Holder Specifications: Product Material: metal Product Size: 4.2ft or 5.7ft Product Color: black, gold Package Includes: 1× welcome sign stand About the Wedding Welcome Sign Stand: Crafted from durable metal, this sign stand is built to withstand outdoor and indoor elements, ensuring long-lasting use while maintaining a sleek, modern look for your wedding or special event. Easy to Assemble and Use: This stand is simple to assemble, It's designed to be quick and easy to set up, saving you time and stress on your big day.
